biography:
Free language education for the world.
Japanese courses available in all languages now! 🇯🇵

latestIgtvVideos.caption: Tune into this IG Live chat between Duolingo Senior Learning Scientist Dr. Cindy Blanco and Ahmed Ali Akbar, host of Radiolingo, our newest podcast series in partnership with @crookedmedia. Their discussion covered gender and language, and more!

latestPosts.caption:
COMING OCT 13: Duolingo’s first original anime in Japanese! 
5 episodes. Now will you do your lessons? Japanese is now available in every language! 

Premiering Oct 13 @ 8am PT/11am ET on Youtube 👀 Subscribe in our bio. 

10月13日に公開！Duolingo初の日本語版オリジナルアニメをお見逃しなく。さあ、日本語を本気で学ぶ時がきた。

10月13日午前11時（米国東部時間）YouTubeで初公開、全言語で試聴可能！
